AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: A brief introduction to who I am.

resume.paragraf_1: Hello there! Thank you for visiting my personal website. I'm Atsiila Arya Nabiih, a student majoring in Computer Engineering Technology at Politeknik Negeri Semarang. I am a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer with a GPA of 3.99 / 4.00.
resume.paragraf_2: I focus on creating web applications that not only provide precise experiences but are also user-friendly. My interests include UI/UX design, frontend development, and software engineering. I enjoy transforming complex problems into simple solutions through thoughtful design.
resume.paragraf_3: I believe that effective communication is crucial for success in any role. I am adaptable, think efficiently, and always strive for the best. I am comfortable working collaboratively in a team and am excited about the opportunity to contribute to impactful projects.
